name: The Booth Gorgon
effect: Deploy a subject-matter expert with seventeen years of institutional grievance and a laminated badge. This card is considered authoritative.

clauses.name: PETRIFICATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a prospect asks a technical question: They are answered with a question about their budget.

clauses.name: TERRITORY PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If another booth representative enters within three feet: They are redirected to a brochure.

clauses.name: STONE GAZE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the Booth Babe Basilisk is in play: All prospects freeze mid-sentence and forget what they came for.

witness_quote: She just stared at me until I left.
